description.ko: 암흑 물질 소용돌이 속에서 새로운 별이 탄생하는 모습으로, 우주 창조의 격렬하면서도 장엄한 아름다움을 보여줍니다.
description.en: The birth of new stars within a dark matter vortex, showcasing the violent yet majestic beauty of cosmic creation.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Stellar Nursery.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter acting as a womb for newborn stars. Inside the #3D1A78 deep purple nebula clouds, bright #E6E6FA lavender star clusters ignite, casting light through #7B68EE violet cosmic dust. Extreme gravitational lensing warps the light of distant galaxies into glowing halos around the central abyss. Atmosphere of infinite scale and silent majesty, hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic, volumetric lighting, and terrifyingly beautiful cosmic creation. 8k resolution.
